evals.prompt: I've just added a new custom skill /frontend-design to .claude/skills/ and updated README.md manually. Now I need to sync all documentation (README and AGENTS.md) to include decision trees and agent context requirements. Run the align-skills-documentation skill to update both files with agent-friendly documentation.
evals.expected_output: Updated README.md with synchronized skills table and trigger patterns. Updated AGENTS.md with decision trees showing if-then flows for agent selection, agent combinations matrix, custom skill integration guide mapping /frontend-design to workflow phases, and agent context requirements.

assertions.name: readme_skills_table_updated
assertions.description: README.md contains updated skills table with /frontend-design skill

assertions.name: agents_md_has_decision_trees
assertions.description: AGENTS.md contains Decision Trees section with if-then flows

assertions.name: agents_md_has_combinations_matrix
assertions.description: AGENTS.md contains Agent Combinations & Context Flow matrix

assertions.name: agents_md_has_custom_skills_integration
assertions.description: AGENTS.md contains Custom Skills Integration Guide with /frontend-design mapped

assertions.name: agents_md_has_context_requirements
assertions.description: AGENTS.md contains Agent Context Requirements table

assertions.name: frontend_design_in_integration_guide
assertions.description: /frontend-design skill is documented in Custom Skills Integration Guide

evals.prompt: Our project uses semantic-release, pr, and create-changelog custom skills alongside agent-skills. Generate comprehensive agent-friendly documentation that shows how these custom skills integrate into the development workflow. Decision trees should help agents understand when to use /pr after /build and where /create-changelog fits before /ship.
evals.expected_output: AGENTS.md with clear decision trees for skill selection, agent combinations matrix showing /spec → /plan → /build sequences, custom skills integration guide documenting /pr integration after review and /create-changelog before ship, and agent context requirements with prerequisites and state flow.

assertions.name: decision_tree_feature_implementation
assertions.description: Decision trees include 'I need to implement a feature' branch

assertions.name: decision_tree_bug_fix
assertions.description: Decision trees include 'Something is broken' branch

assertions.name: pr_integration_documented
assertions.description: Custom Skills Integration Guide documents /pr usage after /build

assertions.name: create_changelog_integration
assertions.description: Custom Skills Integration Guide documents /create-changelog before /ship

assertions.name: semantic_release_integration
assertions.description: Custom Skills Integration Guide documents /semantic-release during planning

evals.prompt: Audit documentation drift: We've removed the /github-mcp-setup skill but it's still documented in AGENTS.md and README.md. Run align-skills-documentation to detect and report this discrepancy, and generate a fresh audit showing what's in code vs what's documented.
evals.expected_output: Report showing /github-mcp-setup documented but not in codebase. Summary of all skills by type (Custom, Open-source, Agent Skill). README.md updated to remove /github-mcp-setup. AGENTS.md sections updated with accurate skill inventory. Documentation coverage percentage and recommendations for resolving drift.

assertions.name: drift_detected_in_report
assertions.description: Generated report identifies /github-mcp-setup as removed but still documented

assertions.name: github_mcp_setup_removed_from_readme
assertions.description: README.md updated to remove /github-mcp-setup from skills table

assertions.name: github_mcp_setup_removed_from_agents_md
assertions.description: AGENTS.md updated to remove /github-mcp-setup from custom skills integration guide

assertions.name: audit_summary_generated
assertions.description: Report includes documentation coverage percentage and skill inventory by type

assertions.name: skills_by_type_breakdown
assertions.description: Report shows summary of Custom, Open-source, and Agent Skill counts

assertions.name: drift_recommendations
assertions.description: Report includes recommendations for resolving documentation drift
